mapper.select: SELECT SUM(total_trips) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_fare, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance, AVG(avg_duration) as avg_duration, SUM(total_tip) as total_tip, AVG(avg_tip) as avg_tip, SUM(airport_trips) as airport_trips FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT stat_date, total_trips as trip_count, total_revenue, avg_fare, avg_distance, avg_duration, total_tip, avg_tip, airport_trips FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT airport_trip as airport_code, CASE airport_trip WHEN 'JFK' THEN '肯尼迪机场' WHEN 'LaGuardia' THEN '拉瓜迪亚机场' WHEN 'EWR' THEN '纽瓦克机场' WHEN 'airport' THEN '机场出行' WHEN 'non_airport' THEN '非机场出行' ELSE airport_trip END as airport_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as total_amount, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as avg_amount, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_distance) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as avg_distance, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip IS NOT NULL AND airport_trip != 'null'), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip IS NOT NULL AND airport_trip != 'null' GROUP BY airport_trip HAVING SUM(trip_count) > 0 ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(CASE WHEN airport_trip = 'airport' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) as airport_trips, SUM(CASE WHEN airport_trip = 'non_airport' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) as non_airport_trips, SUM(trip_count) as total_trips FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT vendor_name as vendor_id, CASE vendor_name WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE vendor_name END as vendor_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_revenue), 0) as total_amount, COALESCE(AVG(avg_distance), 0) as avg_trip_distance, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(total_revenue) FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as market_share FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND vendor_name != 'null' AND vendor_name != '' GROUP BY vendor_name HAVING SUM(trip_count) > 0 ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT stat_date as date, vendor_name, trip_count, total_revenue, avg_fare, avg_distance, revenue_ratio FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND vendor_name = #{vendorName} ORDER BY stat_date, vendor_name

SELECT CASE payment_name WHEN 'Credit Card' THEN 'credit_card' WHEN 'Cash' THEN 'cash' WHEN 'No Charge' THEN 'no_charge' WHEN 'Dispute' THEN 'dispute' WHEN 'Unknown' THEN 'unknown' ELSE LOWER(REPLACE(payment_name, ' ', '_')) END as payment_type, payment_name as payment_code, CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN '信用卡' WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN '现金' WHEN payment_name = 'No Charge' THEN '无消费' WHEN payment_name = 'Dispute' THEN '争议' WHEN payment_name = 'Unknown' THEN '未知' ELSE payment_name END as payment_desc, COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) as trip_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND payment_name IS NOT NULL AND payment_name != 'null' AND TRIM(payment_name) != ''), 0), 2) as percentage, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_amount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(total_amount) / SUM(trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, COALESCE(SUM(total_tip), 0) as total_tip, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(total_tip) / SUM(trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_tip, CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END as is_cashless FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND payment_name IS NOT NULL AND payment_name != 'null' AND TRIM(payment_name) != '' GROUP BY payment_name ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) as credit_card_count, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) as cash_count, SUM(trip_count) as total_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Credit Card' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0), 2) as credit_card_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = 'Cash' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0), 2) as cash_pct FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT distance_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(avg_distance), 2) as avg_distance FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY distance_range ORDER BY CASE distance_range WHEN '0-5英里' THEN 1 WHEN '5-10英里' THEN 2 WHEN '10-20英里' THEN 3 WHEN '20-50英里' THEN 4 WHEN '50-120英里' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT duration_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_duration_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(avg_duration), 2) as avg_duration FROM analysis_duration_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY duration_range ORDER BY CASE duration_range WHEN '0-10分钟' THEN 1 WHEN '10-20分钟' THEN 2 WHEN '20-30分钟' THEN 3 WHEN '30-60分钟' THEN 4 WHEN '60分钟以上' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT passenger_range, CASE passenger_range WHEN '1人' THEN 1 WHEN '2人' THEN 2 WHEN '3人' THEN 3 WHEN '4人' THEN 4 WHEN '5人及以上' THEN 5 ELSE 1 END as avg_passenger_count, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_passenger_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_passenger_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY passenger_range ORDER BY CASE passenger_range WHEN '1人' THEN 1 WHEN '2人' THEN 2 WHEN '3人' THEN 3 WHEN '4人' THEN 4 WHEN '5人及以上' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT CASE WHEN avg_tip = 0 THEN '无小费' WHEN tip_rate < 5 THEN '0-5%' WHEN tip_rate < 10 THEN '5-10%' WHEN tip_rate < 15 THEN '10-15%' WHEN tip_rate < 20 THEN '15-20%' ELSE '20%以上' END as tip_range, COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) as trip_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 1) FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND payment_name IS NOT NULL AND payment_name != 'Cash' AND payment_name != 'null' AND TRIM(payment_name) != ''), 0), 2) as percentage, ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN avg_tip > 0 THEN avg_tip ELSE 0 END), 2) as avg_tip, ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN avg_tip > 0 AND total_amount > 0 THEN avg_tip / total_amount * 100 ELSE 0 END), 2) as avg_tip_rate FROM ( SELECT payment_name, COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_tip), 0) as total_tip, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(trip_count), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_tip), 0) / SUM(trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_tip, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_tip), 0) / SUM(total_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as tip_rate, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND payment_name IS NOT NULL AND payment_name != 'Cash' AND payment_name != 'null' AND TRIM(payment_name) != '' GROUP BY payment_name UNION ALL SELECT 'default' as payment_name, 0 as trip_count, 0 as total_tip, 0 as avg_tip, 0 as tip_rate, 0 as total_amount FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND payment_name IS NOT NULL AND payment_name != 'Cash' AND payment_name != 'null' AND TRIM(payment_name) != '' ) ) payment_data GROUP BY CASE WHEN avg_tip = 0 THEN '无小费' WHEN tip_rate < 5 THEN '0-5%' WHEN tip_rate < 10 THEN '5-10%' WHEN tip_rate < 15 THEN '10-15%' WHEN tip_rate < 20 THEN '15-20%' ELSE '20%以上' END ORDER BY CASE tip_range WHEN '无小费' THEN 1 WHEN '0-5%' THEN 2 WHEN '5-10%' THEN 3 WHEN '10-15%' THEN 4 WHEN '15-20%' THEN 5 WHEN '20%以上' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END

SELECT hour_of_day as hour, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_fare, AVG(avg_tip) as avg_tip, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, CASE WHEN hour_of_day BETWEEN 7 AND 9 OR hour_of_day BETWEEN 17 AND 19 THEN true ELSE false END as peak_hour FROM analysis_hourly_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY hour_of_day ORDER BY hour_of_day

SELECT day_of_week, CASE day_of_week WHEN 1 THEN '周日' WHEN 2 THEN '周一' WHEN 3 THEN '周二' WHEN 4 THEN '周三' WHEN 5 THEN '周四' WHEN 6 THEN '周五' WHEN 7 THEN '周六' ELSE '未知' END as day_name, CASE WHEN day_of_week IN (1, 7) THEN true ELSE false END as is_weekend, SUM(total_trips) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, AVG(avg_fare) as avg_fare, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance FROM analysis_weekday_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY day_of_week ORDER BY day_of_week

SELECT TRIM(v.vendor_name) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(v.vendor_name) WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE TRIM(v.vendor_name) END as dim1_name, TRIM(p.payment_name) as dim2_value, CASE TRIM(p.payment_name) WHEN 'Credit Card' THEN '信用卡' WHEN 'Cash' THEN '现金' WHEN 'No Charge' THEN '无消费' WHEN 'Dispute' THEN '争议' WHEN 'Unknown' THEN '未知' ELSE TRIM(p.payment_name) END as dim2_name, SUM(v.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(v.total_revenue), 0) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(v.trip_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(v.total_revenue) / SUM(v.trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(v.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_vendor v LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis p ON v.stat_date = p.stat_date WHERE v.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND p.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(v.vendor_name) != '' AND p.payment_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.payment_name) != '' AND v.trip_count > 0 AND p.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(v.vendor_name), TRIM(p.payment_name) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(air.airport_trip) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(air.airport_trip) WHEN 'JFK' THEN '肯尼迪机场' WHEN 'LGA' THEN '拉瓜迪亚机场' WHEN 'EWR' THEN '纽瓦克机场' WHEN 'airport' THEN '机场出行' WHEN 'non_airport' THEN '非机场出行' ELSE TRIM(air.airport_trip) END as dim1_name, TRIM(p.payment_name) as dim2_value, CASE TRIM(p.payment_name) WHEN 'Credit Card' THEN '信用卡' WHEN 'Cash' THEN '现金' WHEN 'No Charge' THEN '无消费' WHEN 'Dispute' THEN '争议' WHEN 'Unknown' THEN '未知' ELSE TRIM(p.payment_name) END as dim2_name, SUM(air.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(air.trip_count) * (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(avg_fare), 0) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0) as total_amount, ROUND((SELECT COALESCE(AVG(avg_fare), 0) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 2) as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(air.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_airport air LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis p ON air.stat_date = p.stat_date WHERE air.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND p.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND air.airport_trip IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(air.airport_trip) != '' AND p.payment_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.payment_name) != '' AND air.trip_count > 0 AND p.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(air.airport_trip), TRIM(p.payment_name) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(v.vendor_name) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(v.vendor_name) WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE TRIM(v.vendor_name) END as dim1_name, TRIM(air.airport_trip) as dim2_value, CASE TRIM(air.airport_trip) WHEN 'JFK' THEN '肯尼迪机场' WHEN 'LGA' THEN '拉瓜迪亚机场' WHEN 'EWR' THEN '纽瓦克机场' WHEN 'airport' THEN '机场出行' WHEN 'non_airport' THEN '非机场出行' ELSE TRIM(air.airport_trip) END as dim2_name, SUM(v.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(v.total_revenue), 0) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(v.trip_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(v.total_revenue) / SUM(v.trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(v.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_vendor v LEFT JOIN analysis_airport air ON v.stat_date = air.stat_date WHERE v.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(v.vendor_name) != '' AND v.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(v.vendor_name), TRIM(air.airport_trip) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(v.vendor_name) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(v.vendor_name) WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE TRIM(v.vendor_name) END as dim1_name, CASE WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 6 AND 9 THEN '早高峰' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 10 AND 14 THEN '午间' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN '晚高峰' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 21 AND 23 OR h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 0 AND 2 THEN '夜间' ELSE '平峰' END as dim2_value, CASE WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 6 AND 9 THEN '早高峰(6-9点)' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 10 AND 14 THEN '午间(10-14点)' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN '晚高峰(17-20点)' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 21 AND 23 OR h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 0 AND 2 THEN '夜间(21-2点)' ELSE '平峰(其他时段)' END as dim2_name, SUM(h.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(h.total_revenue), 0) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(h.trip_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(h.total_revenue) / SUM(h.trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(h.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_hourly_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_hourly_distribution h LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor v ON h.stat_date = v.stat_date WHERE h.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(v.vendor_name) != '' AND h.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(v.vendor_name), CASE WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 6 AND 9 THEN '早高峰' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 10 AND 14 THEN '午间' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN '晚高峰' WHEN h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 21 AND 23 OR h.hour_of_day BETWEEN 0 AND 2 THEN '夜间' ELSE '平峰' END ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(v.vendor_name) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(v.vendor_name) WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE TRIM(v.vendor_name) END as dim1_name, TRIM(d.distance_range) as dim2_value, TRIM(d.distance_range) as dim2_name, SUM(d.trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(d.trip_count) * COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as total_amount, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(d.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_distance_distribution d LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor v ON d.stat_date = v.stat_date WHERE d.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(v.vendor_name) != '' AND d.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(v.vendor_name), TRIM(d.distance_range) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(v.vendor_name) as dim1_value, CASE TRIM(v.vendor_name) WHEN 'VTS' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN 'CMT' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN 'DDS' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN 'FARE' THEN 'Fare Payments' WHEN '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' WHEN '2' THEN 'VeriFone Transportation Systems' WHEN '3' THEN 'Digital Dispatch Systems' WHEN '4' THEN 'Fare Payments' ELSE TRIM(v.vendor_name) END as dim1_name, TRIM(p.passenger_range) as dim2_value, TRIM(p.passenger_range) as dim2_name, SUM(p.trip_count) as trip_count, ROUND(SUM(p.trip_count) * COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as total_amount, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_fare) FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(p.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_passenger_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_passenger_distribution p LEFT JOIN analysis_vendor v ON p.stat_date = v.stat_date WHERE p.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(v.vendor_name) != '' AND p.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(v.vendor_name), TRIM(p.passenger_range) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT TRIM(b.pu_borough) as dim1_value, COALESCE(TRIM(b.pu_borough), '未知') as dim1_name, TRIM(p.payment_name) as dim2_value, CASE TRIM(p.payment_name) WHEN 'Credit Card' THEN '信用卡' WHEN 'Cash' THEN '现金' WHEN 'No Charge' THEN '无消费' WHEN 'Dispute' THEN '争议' WHEN 'Unknown' THEN '未知' ELSE TRIM(p.payment_name) END as dim2_name, SUM(b.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_revenue), 0) as total_amount, CASE WHEN SUM(b.trip_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(b.total_revenue) / SUM(b.trip_count), 2) ELSE 0 END as avg_amount, ROUND(SUM(b.trip_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_borough_flow WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_borough_flow b LEFT JOIN analysis_payment_analysis p ON b.stat_date = p.stat_date WHERE b.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND b.pu_borough IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(b.pu_borough) != '' AND b.trip_count > 0 GROUP BY TRIM(b.pu_borough), TRIM(p.payment_name) ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT 'trip_count' as metric_name, stat_date, total_trips as value FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} UNION ALL SELECT 'total_revenue' as metric_name, stat_date, total_revenue as value FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} UNION ALL SELECT 'avg_fare' as metric_name, stat_date, avg_fare as value FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} UNION ALL SELECT 'avg_distance' as metric_name, stat_date, avg_distance as value FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} UNION ALL SELECT 'airport_trips' as metric_name, stat_date, airport_trips as value FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT stat_date, total_trips as trip_count, total_revenue, avg_fare, avg_distance, airport_trips FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT a.vendor_name as row_value, a.payment_name as col_value, SUM(a.trip_count) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(a.total_amount), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_multi_dimension a WHERE a.stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND a.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND a.payment_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.vendor_name, a.payment_name HAVING SUM(a.trip_count) > 0 ORDER BY a.vendor_name, a.payment_name

SELECT pu_borough as pickup_borough, do_borough as dropoff_borough, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_distance FROM analysis_borough_flow WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pu_borough, do_borough ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT pu_zone as zone_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(total_revenue) FROM analysis_revenue_contribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as contribution_rate FROM analysis_revenue_contribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pu_zone ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT fee_code, fee_name, SUM(total_amount) as total_amount, ROUND(SUM(total_amount) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM analysis_fee_composition WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as percentage FROM analysis_fee_composition WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND fee_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(fee_code) != '' GROUP BY fee_code, fee_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT stat_date as date, airport_trip, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, AVG(trip_ratio) as avg_ratio FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip = #{airportCode} GROUP BY stat_date, airport_trip ORDER BY stat_date, airport_trip

SELECT stat_date, total_trips as trip_count, total_revenue as total_amount, avg_fare as avg_amount, avg_distance, 0 as passenger_count, 0.0 as growth_rate, 0.0 as moving_average FROM analysis_kpi_daily WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT borough as borough, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, ROUND(AVG(avg_fare), 2) as avg_fare, SUM(total_tip) as total_tip, ROUND(AVG(avg_tip), 2) as avg_tip, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(total_revenue) FROM analysis_fee_by_borough WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}), 0), 2) as revenue_ratio FROM analysis_fee_by_borough WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND borough IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(borough) != '' GROUP BY borough ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT zone_name, borough, service_zone, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue FROM analysis_pickup_hotspots WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND zone_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(zone_name) != '' GROUP BY zone_name, borough, service_zone ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT zone_name, borough, service_zone, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count FROM analysis_dropoff_hotspots WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND zone_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(zone_name) != '' GROUP BY zone_name, borough, service_zone ORDER BY trip_count DESC

SELECT taxi_type as taxi_type, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue, ROUND(AVG(avg_fare), 2) as avg_fare, SUM(total_tip) as total_tip, ROUND(AVG(avg_tip), 2) as avg_tip, ROUND(AVG(tip_rate), 2) as tip_rate FROM analysis_fee_by_taxi_type WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND taxi_type IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(taxi_type) != '' GROUP BY taxi_type ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT v.vendor_name as vendor_name, p.payment_type as payment_type, COALESCE(SUM(v.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(v.total_revenue * p.payment_ratio), 0) as total_amount, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(v.total_revenue * p.payment_ratio) / NULLIF(SUM(v.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0), 2), 0) as avg_amount FROM analysis_vendor_comparison v CROSS JOIN analysis_payment_distribution p WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR v.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR v.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND p.payment_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY v.vendor_name, p.payment_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT a.airport_code as airport_code, a.airport_name as airport_name, h.hour_of_day as hour_of_day, COALESCE(SUM(a.trip_count * h.hour_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(a.total_revenue * h.hour_ratio), 0) as total_amount, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(a.avg_distance * a.trip_count * h.hour_ratio) / NULLIF(SUM(a.trip_count * h.hour_ratio), 0), 2), 0) as avg_distance FROM analysis_airport_statistics a CROSS JOIN analysis_hourly_distribution h WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR a.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR a.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND a.airport_code IS NOT NULL AND h.hour_of_day IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.airport_code, a.airport_name, h.hour_of_day ORDER BY a.airport_code, h.hour_of_day

SELECT b.borough as borough, p.payment_type as payment_type, COALESCE(SUM(b.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_revenue * p.payment_ratio), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_borough_revenue b CROSS JOIN analysis_payment_distribution p WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR b.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR b.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND b.borough IS NOT NULL AND p.payment_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY b.borough, p.payment_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT v.vendor_name as vendor_name, t.taxi_type as taxi_type, COALESCE(SUM(v.trip_count * t.taxi_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(v.total_revenue * t.taxi_ratio), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_vendor_comparison v CROSS JOIN ( SELECT taxi_type, SUM(trip_count) / (SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_fee_by_taxi_type WHERE stat_date BETWEEN COALESCE(#{startDate}, '2023-01-01') AND COALESCE(#{endDate}, '2025-12-31')) as taxi_ratio FROM analysis_fee_by_taxi_type WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND taxi_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY taxi_type ) t WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR v.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR v.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND v.vendor_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY v.vendor_name, t.taxi_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC

SELECT a.airport_code as source, a.airport_name as source_name, b.borough as target, COALESCE(SUM(a.trip_count * b.borough_ratio), 0) as flow_count, COALESCE(SUM(a.total_revenue * b.borough_ratio), 0) as flow_amount FROM analysis_airport_statistics a CROSS JOIN ( SELECT borough, SUM(trip_count) / (SELECT SUM(trip_count) FROM analysis_borough_revenue WHERE stat_date BETWEEN COALESCE(#{startDate}, '2023-01-01') AND COALESCE(#{endDate}, '2025-12-31')) as borough_ratio FROM analysis_borough_revenue WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND borough IS NOT NULL GROUP BY borough ) b WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR a.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR a.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND a.airport_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.airport_code, a.airport_name, b.borough ORDER BY flow_amount DESC

SELECT h.hour_of_day as hour_of_day, p.payment_type as payment_type, COALESCE(SUM(h.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(h.total_revenue * p.payment_ratio), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_hourly_distribution h CROSS JOIN analysis_payment_distribution p WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR h.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR h.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND h.hour_of_day IS NOT NULL AND p.payment_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY h.hour_of_day, p.payment_type ORDER BY h.hour_of_day, p.payment_type

SELECT d.distance_range as distance_range, p.payment_type as payment_type, COALESCE(SUM(d.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(d.total_amount * p.payment_ratio), 0) as total_amount, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(d.total_amount * p.payment_ratio) / NULLIF(SUM(d.trip_count * p.payment_ratio), 0), 2), 0) as avg_amount FROM analysis_distance_distribution d CROSS JOIN analysis_payment_distribution p WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR d.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR d.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND d.distance_range IS NOT NULL AND p.payment_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.distance_range, p.payment_type ORDER BY d.distance_range, total_amount DESC

SELECT w.weekday as weekday, h.hour_of_day as hour_of_day, COALESCE(SUM(w.trip_count * h.hour_ratio), 0) as trip_count, COALESCE(SUM(w.total_revenue * h.hour_ratio), 0) as total_amount FROM analysis_weekday_analysis w CROSS JOIN analysis_hourly_distribution h WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR w.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR w.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND w.weekday IS NOT NULL AND h.hour_of_day IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.weekday, h.hour_of_day ORDER BY w.weekday, h.hour_of_day

SELECT t.taxi_type as taxi_type, 'fare' as fee_type, SUM(t.total_revenue) as total_amount, ROUND(AVG(t.avg_fare), 2) as avg_amount FROM analysis_fee_by_taxi_type t WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR t.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR t.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND t.taxi_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.taxi_type UNION ALL SELECT t.taxi_type as taxi_type, 'tip' as fee_type, SUM(t.total_tip) as total_amount, ROUND(AVG(t.avg_tip), 2) as avg_amount FROM analysis_fee_by_taxi_type t WHERE (#{startDate} IS NULL OR t.stat_date >= #{startDate}) AND (#{endDate} IS NULL OR t.stat_date <= #{endDate}) AND t.taxi_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.taxi_type ORDER BY taxi_type, FIELD(fee_type, 'fare', 'tip')
